headline: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Synopsys 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) has outperformed the market over the past 20 years by 7.95% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 17.18%. Currently, Synopsys has a market capitalization of $83.78 billion.
